security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://export.arxiv.org https://api.crossref.org https://dblp.org https://api.semanticscholar.org https://api.openalex.org; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Detect hallucinated citations in academic papers
bundle.longDescription: bibguard verifies every reference in your .bib file against five scholarly databases (arXiv, Crossref, DBLP, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex). Catches phantom DOIs, fabricated arXiv IDs, author mismatches, and AI-hallucinated citations.
